core_modules.description: Top-level package initializer for Psi4. Acts as the primary import surface but likely depends on compiled native components.
Primary runtime/launcher module for executing Psi4 workflows from Python context.
Central high-level driver logic for energy/gradient/property orchestration; large and core to computation flow.
Schema-oriented wrapper layer (QCSchema-style execution paths), suitable for structured programmatic invocation.
Task planning/orchestration module; useful for building minimally intrusive higher-level automation.
Existing plugin utility support; best insertion point for MCP-aligned extension with minimal architectural disruption.
